data.title: Siav Corrects Key Deadlines for Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Siav S.p.A. ( (IT:SIAV) ).

Siav has issued a correction to the notice convening its upcoming extraordinary shareholders’ meeting, clarifying several key procedural dates for investors. The company now confirms that the record date determining voting entitlement is 25 March 2026, and not 26 March, and that intermediary communications must reach the company by 31 March 2026 instead of 1 April.

The group also adjusts the deadlines for granting proxies and submitting shareholders’ questions, bringing each forward by one day to align with regulatory requirements and the correct trading‑day count. Participation remains possible only via the designated representative, meaning the revised timetable is operationally important for shareholders seeking to exercise voting rights and engage with the meeting agenda.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:SIAV) stock is a Buy with a EUR5.35 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Siav S.p.A. stock, see the IT:SIAV Stock Forecast page.

More about Siav S.p.A.

Siav S.p.A. Società Benefit is an Italian leader in document management and business process outsourcing, headquartered in Rubano and listed on Euronext Growth Milan. Founded in 1989, it serves over 4,000 public and private clients mainly in Italy, offering proprietary document management software suites, vertical sector solutions and outsourcing services such as dematerialisation and B2B e‑invoicing. The group also operates in Switzerland and Romania and reported 2024 consolidated revenues of €33.3 million and EBITDA of €6.3 million.

Average Trading Volume: 27,400

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €16.22M

Find detailed analytics on SIAV stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Generac Restructures Reporting Into Residential and C&I Segments
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Generac Holdings ( (GNRC) ) has provided an update.

On March 20, 2026, Generac approved incremental performance-based equity awards for executives Norm Taffe and Erik Wilde, with target values of $1 million and $2 million, respectively, vesting over two to three years and tied to business-specific performance metrics. The awards are designed to more closely link senior leadership compensation with the company’s Generac Home and Domestic C&I growth initiatives.

On March 25, 2026, Generac announced a reorganization of its reporting structure, shifting from Domestic and International to Residential and Commercial & Industrial segments effective March 31, 2026. The change aligns reporting with how management now runs the business, emphasizes a unified residential energy and backup power strategy, consolidates global C&I operations, leaves historical consolidated results unchanged, and will be reflected in financial reporting from the first quarter of fiscal 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (GNRC) stock is a Buy with a $224.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Generac Holdings stock, see the GNRC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GNRC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GNRC is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects pressured recent profitability and volatile cash flow (largest constraint), partially offset by constructive 2026 guidance and strengthening C&I/data-center demand. Technicals show a strong uptrend but look overextended, while valuation is a notable headwind due to the high P/E and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on GNRC stock, click here.

More about Generac Holdings

Generac Holdings Inc. is a manufacturer of backup power systems, energy technology solutions and outdoor power equipment, serving residential, commercial and industrial customers. The company focuses on emergency backup generators, mobile power and lighting products, battery energy storage systems and related services across U.S. and international markets.

Average Trading Volume: 1,134,913

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $12.28B

data.title: Silver One to Showcase Nevada and Arizona Silver Advances at April Investor Webinar
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Silver One Resources ( (TSE:SVE) ) is now available.

Silver One Resources will present an online webcast at the John Tumazos Very Independent Research virtual conference on April 1, 2026, where President and CEO Greg Crowe will update investors on ongoing metallurgical work and drilling at the past-producing Candelaria silver mine in Nevada. The company is testing non-cyanide leaching technologies to upgrade heap leach resources and advance toward a pre-feasibility study target, signalling progress toward potential near-term production and de-risking of the project for stakeholders.

The presentation will also cover continued exploration at the Phoenix Silver project in Arizona, where Silver One is evaluating both very high-grade silver vein potential and a possible porphyry copper-silver system adjacent to major producers such as Freeport McMoRan and BHP. By highlighting its work within one of the most prolific U.S. porphyry copper-silver belts, the company is underscoring its strategic positioning in a tier-one mining jurisdiction and aiming to attract broader investor interest in its exploration pipeline.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SVE) stock is a Sell with a C$0.48 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Silver One Resources stock, see the TSE:SVE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SVE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SVE is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (pre-revenue with ongoing losses and cash burn) and bearish technical signals (price below key moving averages with negative MACD). A low-debt balance sheet is a mitigating positive, but valuation support is limited given the negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SVE stock, click here.

More about Silver One Resources

Silver One Resources is a Canadian-listed exploration and development company focused on advancing high-quality silver projects in the United States, primarily in Nevada and Arizona. Its flagship asset is the past-producing Candelaria silver mine in Nevada, where it is evaluating the potential reprocessing of historic heap leach pads and pursuing additional high-grade mineralization along strike and at depth. The company also holds the Cherokee project in Nevada, hosting multiple silver-copper-gold vein systems, and the high-grade Phoenix Silver project in Arizona’s prolific “Arizona Silver Belt.”

Average Trading Volume: 816,167

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$179.9M

data.title: Toogood Gold Outlines 8.5 km High-Grade Trend at Newfoundland Project
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Toogood Gold Corp. ( (TSE:TGC) ) is now available.

Toogood Gold Corp. reported final Phase 2 surface exploration results from its Toogood Gold Project in Newfoundland, confirming high-grade gold samples up to 76.89 g/t along an 8.5-kilometre Shoreline trend and additional significant grades at the Chimo, Vic, and Hank targets. The program, which collected more than 650 rock and soil samples, has outlined several kilometre-scale gold corridors and materially improved the geological model, highlighting a structurally controlled system with strong alignment between mineralization, geochemical anomalies, and major faults.

The company has now defined multiple high-priority, structurally coherent drill target corridors in the NE Block, including the Burnt Arm, Western, and Eastern trends, and plans to advance these toward initial drill testing in 2026. Planned work will focus on infill and regional soil sampling, detailed structural mapping, and systematic drill-target generation, potentially transforming surface anomalies into scalable drill targets and strengthening Toogood Gold’s position in an emerging Newfoundland gold district.

More about Toogood Gold Corp.

Toogood Gold Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on gold, with its flagship 100%-owned Toogood Gold Project located on New World Island in Newfoundland. The company is advancing early-stage, high-grade, structurally controlled gold targets across multiple kilometre-scale trends, positioning itself within a district-scale exploration play in Atlantic Canada.

Average Trading Volume: 271,635

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Learn more about TGC stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Zengame Technology Announces HKD 0.2 Final Dividend for 2025
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Zengame Technology Holding Ltd. ( (HK:2660) ) has provided an announcement.

Zengame Technology Holding Limited has proposed a final ordinary cash dividend of HKD 0.2 per share for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, underscoring its continued focus on shareholder returns and cash distribution. The payout, subject to shareholder approval on 22 May 2026, will be based on a record date of 3 June 2026 and is scheduled for payment on 25 June 2026, providing income visibility for investors and signaling management’s confidence in the company’s financial performance.

The shares will trade ex-dividend on 28 May 2026, with the share register closing from 1 June to 3 June 2026 to determine dividend entitlements. The announcement, which specifies no applicable withholding tax and no impact from warrants or convertible securities, offers clarity on key dates and mechanics of the distribution, helping institutional and retail shareholders plan their portfolio and cash-flow decisions around the dividend event.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2660) stock is a Buy with a HK$3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Zengame Technology Holding Ltd. stock, see the HK:2660 Stock Forecast page.

More about Zengame Technology Holding Ltd.

Zengame Technology Holding Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company in the technology and gaming sector. It develops and operates mobile and online games, targeting mass-market players in Greater China and other key Asian markets, and generates revenue primarily through in-game purchases and associated digital services.

data.title: Handelsbanken AGM Backs Dividend, Buyback Mandates and Board Continuity
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Svenska Handelsbanken AB ( ($SE:SHB.A) ) has provided an announcement.

Svenska Handelsbanken’s annual general meeting re-elected all current board members, confirmed Pär Boman as chairman, and renewed mandates for PwC and Deloitte as auditors, while setting detailed board and committee fees and approving the 2025 financial statements and executive remuneration report. Shareholders approved a dividend of SEK 17.50 per share, authorised substantial share buybacks for capital management and trading purposes, granted the board authority to issue convertible Additional Tier 1 instruments, appointed Azets as auditor for associated foundations, and rejected a shareholder proposal, reinforcing the bank’s existing governance and capital strategy.

The AGM resolutions give the board broad flexibility to manage the bank’s capital structure through buybacks and potential AT1 issuances. These decisions, alongside a sizeable dividend and continuity in board composition and auditors, signal confidence in Handelsbanken’s financial position and strategic direction, with implications for shareholder returns, regulatory capital planning, and the bank’s competitive stance in the Nordic banking sector.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:SHB.A) stock is a Hold with a SEK148.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Svenska Handelsbanken AB stock, see the SE:SHB.A Stock Forecast page.

More about Svenska Handelsbanken AB

Svenska Handelsbanken AB is a major Nordic banking group headquartered in Stockholm, focusing on universal banking services including retail, corporate, and investment banking. The bank serves private individuals, businesses, and institutional clients, with a strong presence in Sweden and other key Nordic markets and an emphasis on conservative risk management and long-term customer relationships.

Average Trading Volume: 6,664,730

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK271.8B

data.title: Cognyte Delivers Strong Fiscal 2026 Results and Lifts Outlook for 2027
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Cognyte Software ( (CGNT) ).

On March 25, 2026, Cognyte Software reported strong results for its fourth quarter and fiscal year ended January 31, 2026, highlighted by double-digit revenue growth and sharply improved profitability. Quarterly revenue rose 12.4% to $106.2 million with GAAP net income of $5.1 million, while full-year revenue climbed 14.1% to $400 million and GAAP net income swung to a $4.6 million profit from a loss a year earlier.

Non-GAAP operating income more than doubled to $36.7 million for the year, Adjusted EBITDA jumped 66% to $48.2 million, and non-GAAP gross margin expanded to 73%, reflecting scale and operational efficiencies. The company ended the quarter with $116.9 million in cash and no debt, continued to execute on its share repurchase programs with $26.7 million cumulatively bought back since November 2024, and guided for fiscal 2027 revenue of about $448 million and roughly 40% Adjusted EBITDA growth, underscoring management’s confidence and solid visibility from growing backlog and remaining performance obligations.

The most recent analyst rating on (CGNT) stock is a Buy with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cognyte Software stock, see the CGNT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CGNT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CGNT is a Neutral.

The score is supported by improving fundamentals and strong cash generation with low leverage, reinforced by a positive earnings update that included margin expansion and raised full-year guidance. Offsetting these positives, technicals are very weak with the stock trading well below key moving averages and negative momentum, while valuation is constrained by negative earnings (negative P/E).

To see Spark’s full report on CGNT stock, click here.

More about Cognyte Software

Cognyte Software Ltd., based in Herzliya, Israel, is a software-led technology company specializing in investigative analytics solutions that turn large volumes of complex structured and unstructured data into actionable intelligence. Its AI-driven platforms are used primarily by law enforcement, national security and intelligence agencies to enhance public safety, security and operational decision-making.

Reach plc ( (GB:RCH) ) has provided an announcement.

Reach plc has announced that its Annual General Meeting will take place on 6 May 2026 at the offices of Norton Rose Fulbright LLP in London, with the full notice of meeting made available on the company’s website and sent in hard copy to shareholders who have opted for paper communications. The company has also filed the AGM notice and proxy form with the Financial Conduct Authority’s National Storage Mechanism for public inspection and stated that any changes to AGM arrangements will be communicated via its website and a Regulatory News Service announcement.

These steps underscore Reach plc’s adherence to UK listing and governance requirements, providing shareholders with clear information on how to participate and vote at the AGM while ensuring public transparency through regulatory filings. The detailed communication arrangements, including contingency plans for any changes, are intended to support orderly shareholder engagement and maintain confidence among investors and other stakeholders in the company’s corporate governance practices.

data.title: Bravo Mining Trenches Higher-Grade Gold and Copper at Brazil’s Luanga Deposit
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Bravo Mining Corp. ( (TSE:BRVO) ).

Bravo Mining reported assay results from seven new trenches in the North Sector of its Luanga deposit in Brazil, highlighting long intervals of oxide mineralization with notably high grades of palladium, platinum, rhodium and gold, and locally significant copper. The latest results, including intervals such as 151m at 3.6 g/t PGM+Au with 0.16% copper, show higher and broader near-surface grades than previously seen in this area.

The trenching program is designed to improve understanding of near-surface geology and tighten assay spacing to support upgrading resources to the Indicated category. Evidence of anomalous copper associated with elevated gold suggests possible overprinting by IOCG-style mineralization, reinforcing Bravo’s geological model and underpinning its strategic emphasis on copper-gold exploration alongside the ongoing expansion of oxide PGM+Au mineralization at Luanga.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BRVO) stock is a Hold with a C$4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bravo Mining Corp. stock, see the TSE:BRVO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BRVO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BRVO is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak operating fundamentals (no revenue, continued losses, and negative free cash flow). Balance-sheet conservatism (very low debt) provides some support, while technicals are mixed with near-term weakness. Valuation is also constrained by loss-making results and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on BRVO stock, click here.

More about Bravo Mining Corp.

Bravo Mining Corp. is a Canadian exploration company focused on developing its 100%-owned Luanga palladium, platinum, rhodium, gold and nickel deposit in Brazil’s Carajás Mineral Province. The company is also advancing a dedicated copper-gold exploration division, targeting Iron Oxide Copper Gold-style mineralization to complement and potentially enhance the value of its core PGM+Au+Ni project.

Current Market Cap: C$382.1M

Ingredion ( (INGR) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 18, 2026, Ingredion’s board elected long-time executive Jason Payant as interim chief financial officer, effective April 1, 2026, following the previously reported resignation of Executive Vice President and CFO James D. Gray, effective March 31, 2026. Payant, 55, who has been with the company since 2012 and currently serves as vice president of finance for Global Texture & Healthful Solutions, will retain that role while assuming the interim CFO position and will receive an additional $25,000 in monthly cash compensation during his interim tenure, with the company highlighting that his appointment involved no special arrangements or related-party transactions.

The most recent analyst rating on (INGR) stock is a Hold with a $117.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ingredion stock, see the INGR Stock Forecast page.
